title: Lightweight AI Video Upscaler ($19 Lifetime License)
excerpt: PixelUp is a lightweight, 100% offline AI video upscaler for Windows. Say goodbye to subscriptions—upscale your videos locally with CUDA and Vulkan hardware acceleration.
content_html:
PixelUp: Professional AI Video Upscaling Made Simple

Transform your low-resolution videos into stunning high-definition masterpieces with the power of localized AI. Lightweight, lightning-fast, and running 100% on your local machine.

See PixelUp in Action: 8X AI Video Upscaling (512p to 4K)

Tip: Unmute the video to check real-world 8X texture rendering details.

🚀 Enhance Every Pixel Quickly (Up to 8X Super-Resolution)

PixelUp leverages highly optimized Deep Learning models to intelligently reconstruct missing details in your videos. Unlike traditional, blurry interpolation, our AI understands textures and edges, delivering crisp, natural results.

  • 3 Advanced AI Model Matrix: Built-in ESPCN (Fast) for quick renders, FSRCNN (Balanced) for general use, and the heavy-duty LapSRN (High) which supports extreme 2X, 4X, and 8X super-resolution scaling to pull stunning details out of low-res files.
  • Universal Hardware Acceleration: Probes for NVIDIA CUDA first, with automatic fallback cascades to Vulkan or CPU processing—preventing UI deadlocks and system crashes.
  • Flexible Scaling & Batch Control: Upscale files effortlessly to higher target resolutions while queuing up multiple tasks simultaneously via an intuitive drag-and-drop interface.
  • Lossless Audio Syncing: Re-encodes using standard FFmpeg pipelines to preserve original audio bitrates perfectly without track desynchronization.

🛡️ Local-First Privacy (No Subscriptions)

We believe your data belongs to you. PixelUp requires zero cloud connectivity.

  • 100% Fully Offline: All rendering happens strictly on your graphics card or processor. No servers, no account registration, and zero data leaks.
  • Say No to Monthly Costs: No ongoing subscription fees. Our perpetual licensing model gives you full lifetime access to the software forever.

Get Started with PixelUp Pro

Experience unlimited offline upscaling. Buy once, own it for a lifetime.

Also featured on trusted software hubs: View Listing on MajorGeeks

content_html_zh:
PixelUp：专业人工智能视频升级变得简单

借助本地化人工智能的力量，将低分辨率视频转变为令人惊叹的高清杰作。 轻量级、快如闪电，并且 100% 在本地计算机上运行。

查看 PixelUp 的实际应用：8 倍 AI 视频升级（512p 至 4K）

提示：取消视频静音以检查真实世界的 8X 纹理渲染细节。

🚀 快速增强每个像素（高达 8 倍超分辨率）

PixelUp 利用高度优化的深度学习模型来智能地重建视频中缺失的细节。 与传统的模糊插值不同，我们的人工智能可以理解纹理和边缘，从而提供清晰、自然的结果。

  • 3 高级 AI 模型矩阵：内置 ESPCN（快速）用于快速渲染，FSRCNN（平衡）用于一般用途，重型 LapSRN（高）支持极限 2 倍、4 倍和 8 倍超分辨率缩放，可从低分辨率文件中提取令人惊叹的细节。
  • 通用硬件加速：首先探测 NVIDIA CUDA，并自动级联至 Vulkan 或 CPU 处理，防止 UI 死锁和系统崩溃。
  • 灵活的缩放和批量控制：轻松地将文件升级到更高的目标分辨率，同时通过直观的拖放界面同时排队多个任务。
  • 无损音频同步：使用标准 FFmpeg 管道重新编码，完美保留原始音频比特率，而不会出现轨道不同步。

🛡️ 本地优先隐私（无订阅）

我们相信您的数据属于您。 PixelUp 需要零云连接。

  • 100% 完全离线：所有渲染都严格在您的显卡或处理器上进行。 无需服务器、无需注册账号、零数据泄露。
  • 对每月费用说不：没有持续的订阅费。 我们的永久许可模式使您可以在整个生命周期内永远访问该软件。

开始使用 PixelUp Pro

体验无限的离线升级。 购买一次，终身拥有。

还出现在可信软件中心：查看 MajorGeeks 上的列表
